d:
A list app with infinitely nestable lists. This app allows nested lists. That is, a list item may have its own sub-list. Further, items in any sub-list can have their own sub-list. It's lists all the way down! Items have a title and description, and may have one of a number of "checked" states. Features:
  • Nested lists!
  • Home screen widget
  • Human readable list export
